name: threatMatrix
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.matrix.every(function(m){ return Number.isFinite(m.severity) && Number.isFinite(m.likelihood) && Number.isFinite(m.riskScore) && ['critical','high','medium','low'].indexOf(m.riskLevel) >= 0; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'security.threatMatrix'. Drives the page threat-matrix result card (matrix[].{name,riskLevel,riskScore}, totalThreats, criticalCount). riskScore = severity × likelihood; both via secFin() clamp to 1..5 so a poisoned 'Infinity'/'1e999' can't leak a non-finite score. Pinned by server/tests/security-lens-macros.test.js.
